challenge.title: Korak 5
challenge.description:
Kada korisnik izabere karticu, atribut aria-selected treba da se ažurira na "true" za tu karticu i "false" za sve ostale. Ovo ukazuje koja je kartica trenutno aktivna i obezbeđuje pristupačnost za asistivne tehnologije.

Podrazumevano, prva kartica bi trebalo da bude izabrana. To možete učiniti dodavanjem atributa aria-selected prvom button elementu i postavljanjem njegove vrednosti na "true".

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents: Planets

challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: Your first button element should have an aria-selected attribute.
Your first button element should have an aria-selected attribute set to "true".

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Planets

Earth is our home planet, known for its abundant water, diverse ecosystems, and life-supporting atmosphere. It's the only planet in the solar system known to harbor life.

Saturn is famous for its beautiful and extensive ring system made of ice and rock particles. It's a gas giant with dozens of moons orbiting it.

Mars, the red planet, is a rocky world with the tallest volcano and deepest canyon in the solar system. It's a key focus for exploration in the search for past or present life.
